author: Anand Baghel
description: Community-managed installer and updater for GATE Obsidian vaults. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Anand Baghel
manifest.description: Install and update community-maintained GATE Vault repositories.
manifest.name: GATE Manager

name: GATE Manager

releases.author: anandrajbaghel
releases.description:
## ✨ GATE Manager v1.1.0

This release focuses on new functionality, stability, and overall user experience.

### Added
- New features (now add PAT to increase rate limit)
- Improved repository synchronization
- Better update workflow

### Improved
- Faster loading
- Cleaner UI
- Better error handling

### Fixed
- Various bugs reported after v1.0.1
- Stability improvements

Thank you to everyone using GATE Manager!
releases.name: v1.1.0

releases.author: anandrajbaghel
releases.description:
# v1.0.1

## Changed

- Improved README documentation.
- Added Privacy & Network Requests section.
- Added Data Collection section.
- Improved plugin metadata and description.
- General documentation improvements following community review feedback.
releases.name: v1.0.1
